leadText: The Red Apricorn (Japanese: あかぼんぐり Red Bonguri) is a type of Apricorn introduced in Generation II. It can be used to make a Level Ball.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Red Apricorn can be made into a Level Ball by Kurt . If used in the Apriblender , it can produce Aprijuice that boosts the Power Performance stat.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C A red Apricorn . HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A red Apricorn. It assails your nostrils. S V A red Apricorn. It has a pungent scent that assails the nostrils.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In Generations II and IV, due to item names being limited to 12 characters (including spaces), the Red Apricorn is the only Apricorn to have its color fully spelled out in its English name. Burnt Berry trees in Generation II are replaced by Red Apricorn trees in Generation IV .
